wizard.subtitle: Onye ibe gị Discord Rich Presence kacha.
wizard.styleSubtitle: Họrọ isiokwu dabara na vibe gị.
wizard.autoDetectDesc: Solari na-achọpụta ngwa ngwa ma ọ bụ ngwa ị na-eji wee kwalite ọkwa gị.
wizard.profilesDesc: Ntọala ọ bụla nwere ike ịnwe NJ onye ahịa nke ya. Ị nwere ike ịpụta dị ka "Egwuregwu Visual Studio" na "Ịkpọ GTA" n'ụzọ ziri ezi na-ejighị aka gbanwee ntọala.
wizard.clientIdTitle: NJ ndị ahịa zuru ụwa ọnụ
wizard.clientIdSubtitle: A na-eji nke a mgbe ọ nweghị profaịlụ akọwapụtara na-arụ ọrụ.
wizard.clientIdPlaceholder: Tapawa ID ngwa Discord gị ebe a
wizard.clientIdHint: Enweghị otu? Ị nwere ike hazie nke a ma emechaa.
wizard.useDefaultId: Jiri NJ Solari Dabara maka ugbu a
wizard.powerUpSubtitle: Kwado atụmatụ ndị ọzọ ka ị nweta ihe kacha mma na Solari.
wizard.pluginSmartAfkDesc: Hazie ọkwa na-akpaghị aka mgbe ị na-apụ.
wizard.pluginSpotifyDesc: Jiri nka album gosi ihe ị na-ege.
wizard.pluginAutoDetectDesc: Chọpụta egwuregwu na ngwa na-akpaghị aka iji melite ọkwa gị.
wizard.behaviorSubtitle: Hazie ka Solari si eme na sistemụ gị.
wizard.startWithWindowsDesc: Ẹkedori Solari na-akpaghị aka mgbe PC gị na-akpụ akpụ.
wizard.startMinimizedDesc: Mepee na tray sistemu kama igosi windo.
wizard.minimizeToTrayDesc: Imechi windo na-eme ka Solari na-agba ọsọ na tray.
wizard.autoUpdatesDesc: Lelee ụdị Solari ọhụrụ na-akpaghị aka na mmalite.
wizard.soundBoardDesc: Kpọọ ụda n'ime ọwa olu gị. Na-achọ ọkwọ ụgbọ ala VB-Cable (nwere ike ịhazi ya ma emechaa).
wizard.readySubtitle: Ị emechaala! Nwee obi ụtọ na Solari.

hwMonitor.title: Nyochaa ngwaike
hwMonitor.description: Gosipụta CPU, RAM na GPU ozugbo na ọnụnọ Ọgaranya gị.
